scenes.title: The Toy Shelf
scenes.background_prompt: A child's bedroom with a long wooden shelf on the wall, a stack of colorful books in the center of the shelf, a wooden toy train on the carpeted floor below, and soft wallpaper with star patterns. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A child's bedroom with soft lighting. A long wooden shelf is mounted on the wall at eye level. On the far left end of the shelf, a worn stuffed brown teddy bear with a red bow tie sits upright, leaning slightly against the wall. On the far right end, a stuffed white rabbit with long floppy ears and a pink nose sits facing the opposite direction, as far from the bear as the shelf allows. Between them, in the exact center of the shelf, a stack of colorful children's books — red, blue, green, and yellow spines — creates a clear divider. The gap between each stuffed animal and the books is wide and deliberate. On the carpeted floor below the shelf, a small wooden toy train with a red engine and two green carriages sits on a short section of circular wooden track. The wallpaper behind has a gentle pattern of silver stars on pale blue.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place bear on the far left end of the shelf, sitting upright and leaning slightly against wall. Place rabbit on the far right end, sitting and facing opposite direction. Wide deliberate gap between them with books in the center as divider. Place train on the carpeted floor below the shelf.
scenes.scene_description: In the far left foreground of this children's picture-book scene, an open doorway or window reveals an outdoor landscape featuring green rolling hills, several rounded green trees, and small white and pink flowers in the grass under a light blue sky with fluffy white clouds. Inside the room, the floor is covered in a light beige, textured carpet. On the carpet in the lower right foreground, a toy train sits on a circular wooden track. The train is composed of a yellow and green steam locomotive followed by three rectangular cars in yellow, blue, and green, with the final green car carrying a pile of small, colorful blocks. Above the train, a thick, light brown wooden shelf is mounted horizontally against a wall. The wall is covered in wallpaper with a repeating pattern of five-pointed yellow stars and small blue dots on a cream-colored background. On the left side of the shelf, a brown bear with a red bow tie sits upright, facing toward the right. In the center of the shelf is a stack of five books; from top to bottom, the book covers are red, blue, green, yellow, and red. On the right side of the shelf, a white rabbit with pink inner ears sits upright, facing toward the left. The scene is brightly and evenly lit, indicating a clear daytime setting.

CH: a brown teddy bear with a red bow tie
a white rabbit with long pink ears
S: a child's bedroom with star-patterned wallpaper
a sunny day visible through the open doorway
a thick wooden shelf holding toys and books
a soft beige carpet on the floor
IE: the toys are waiting for someone to play
the train is set up on its track
IR: the bear looks happy and friendly
the rabbit seems curious about the books
P: the toys want to play with the train
the rabbit wants to read a book
A: the bear sits quietly on the shelf
the train rests on the circular track
CO: the room is neat and organized
the toys are ready for a new adventure

ENP: a stack of five colorful books
a toy train with four different cars
small white and pink flowers in the grass
SC: while the toys wait on the shelf
when the train starts to move
